453 M1200E_ULCR_CARE_CD M1200E_ULCR_CARE_CD M1200E Skin and Ulcer Treatments: Ulcer Care Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates that the resident is receiving pressure ulcer care. -=Not assessed/no information
